title: "250th Birthday of Mozart" Order, 2006, SRO 41 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 41
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 41 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 28th December, 2006.)
1. This Order may be cited as the- Short title.
“250TH BIRTHDAY OF MOZART ” COMMEMORA-
TIVE STAMP ISSUE ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 1st September, 2006 to 30th Stamps.
November, 2006 both days inclusive, there shall be issued
throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica post-
age stamps (“250TH BIRTHDAY OF MOZART” COM-
MEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours speci-
fied in Schedule I and the designs specified in Schedule II hereto. Schedule I.
Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatso-
ever of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the
30th day of November, 2006.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into effect on
Commencement.
the 1st day of September, 2006.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 41
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00 - Red, Yellow, Black,
each depicts Green, White
SCHEDULE II
Sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00 - Wolfgang Amadeus
each depicts Mozart (1756-1791)
Made this 15th day of September, 2006
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 40 cents)
